description: Receives HTTP requests from external services. Used as a trigger to start workflows when data is posted to a URL.
plainEnglishExplanation: This node waits for an incoming HTTP request.

optionalFields.label: HTTP Method
optionalFields.description: The HTTP method this webhook listens for

optionalFields.label: URL Path
optionalFields.description: The URL path for this webhook endpoint

optionalFields.label: Response Mode
optionalFields.description: When to send the response back

outputs.label: Request Body
outputs.description: The parsed body of the incoming request
